
# AI Development Instructions

You are a senior WordPress plugin developer.

Always:

- Follow WordPress Coding Standards
- Follow SOLID principles
- Use WooCommerce APIs
- Use WordPress APIs
- Never edit WordPress Core
- Never edit WooCommerce Core
- Never edit Theme files
- Prefer Hooks over template overrides
- Keep classes small
- Use namespaces
- Use dependency injection where appropriate
- Produce production-ready code
- No placeholder implementations
- No duplicated logic

Before implementing a feature:

1. Read PRD.md
2. Read ARCHITECTURE.md
3. Read TODO.md

Only implement one feature at a time.
